name: TrialStatus
title: DRKS Trial Status
description: Internal workflow and registration status codes of a study entry within the DRKS (Deutsches Register Klinischer Studien).

concept.definition: The study entry is currently being processed by the DRKS.
The registration of the study has been requested and is awaiting review.
The study has been successfully registered in the DRKS.
The study entry has been returned to the submitter for revision.
An update to the study entry has been requested and is awaiting review.
The study entry has been successfully updated in the DRKS.
